- [x] Scaffold Next.js app (no Tailwind)
- [x] Plan and customize wedding website features
- [x] Implement password-protected landing page
- [x] Create tab navigation for site sections
- [x] Build RSVP page with email validation
- [x] Integrate Formspree for RSVP submission
- [ ] Update README and copilot-instructions.md

## Project Features
- Password-protected landing page
- Tab navigation: The Day, The Weekend, Accommodation & Directions, RSVP
- RSVP page: prompts for email, validates against guest list, loads RSVP form, submits via Formspree

## Next Steps
- Update Formspree endpoint in `RSVPSection.tsx`
- Fill in real guest data in `guests.json`
- Customize content for each tab
- Deploy to your preferred host
